case_title: DAVID STEPEHN ZALOB VS. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED JAN-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF DAVID STEPHEN ZALOB IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WAS NOT SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00) SERVED FEB-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/13/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $232.70 FILED BY ZALOB, DAVID STEPEHN AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZALOB, DAVID STEPEHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. $232.70 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $337.70, FOR DAMAGED CLOTHING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
